name: The Heartroot
descriptionSeed: A city that was GROWN. Not built from wood — grown, over four hundred years, and still growing, and the Rootkin who planted its first hall are alive and consider it a promising start. The halls widen a finger's breadth a year. The doors are living wood and know you after the third visit. Everything here is on a timescale that makes visitors feel like weather — brief, loud, and not really the point. It is the least anxious place in the world and it will drive you slowly out of your mind.
encounterFlavor: Rootkin who answer a question next week and consider that prompt; a grown hall that has decided it does not like you; saplings who are people and are three.
questSeeds: A section of the city has begun growing WRONG and nobody will say the word 'sick'
A visitor promised something forty years ago and the city remembers, and the visitor is back
